GSAP 3.15.0 — official files from the public npm package (npm pack gsap).
Since GSAP 3.13 the whole toolkit, including SplitText and ScrambleText,
is free for commercial use under the standard GSAP license (gsap.com/licensing).
Files: gsap.min.js, ScrollTrigger.min.js, Flip.min.js, SplitText.min.js,
ScrambleTextPlugin.min.js, TextPlugin.min.js
